name: Swingeasy Golf Club - Costa Mesa
address: 1725 Monrovia Ave D-2, Costa Mesa, CA 92627
about: Swingeasy Golf Club - Costa Mesa is a modern golf simulator venue designed to blend the social and competitive aspects of the game. It operates on a membership model, offering private, fully-fitted suites with amenities like couches, large TVs, and the ability to watch sporting events. The venue provides advanced golf simulation technology, allowing guests to play 18 holes at various courses around the US in under 2 hours, with pricing set at $65 per hour for an entire bay that accommodates up to 6 guests. Memberships include 5-7 monthly sessions and discounted rates on private events, while non-members can book public tee times and purchase additional guest passes.
why_golfers_like_it: Fully private, spacious suites with large TVs and comfortable seating
Advanced analytics and tracking software for compelling practice sessions
Ability to play a full 18 holes in under 2 hours at various US courses
Social atmosphere with the option to bring up to 5 guests per booking

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own outside food. Soft drinks are available for purchase on-site.
No mention of alcohol service or bar on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a brand partner but no specific model details provided.
Mentioned as a brand partner but no specific model details provided.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Rental clubs are available for members and guests to use, but players are encouraged to bring their own sets for a better experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Guests are more than welcome to bring any outside food. A variety of soft drinks are available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: We recommend booking about 40 minutes per golfer to finish a full 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes guests of all ages. Children can play golf and enjoy the private suite with the rest of the group.
